summary: A clip from a television interview, presented as a CBS News Exclusive. A bald man in a dark suit, white shirt and dark tie sits speaking, with an American flag and a dimly lit interior behind him. A 'CBS NEWS EXCLUSIVE' graphic appears in the upper left. The framing stays on the seated man across the sampled frames.

script.scene: A bald man in a dark suit speaks in a seated interview; 'CBS NEWS EXCLUSIVE' graphic at upper left, flag behind him.
The same man continues speaking, same framing.
